name: Kitty Loves Birds
author: Poki
description: Kitty Loves Birds is a platform game where you guide an adorable black cat on a mission to catch all the birds and conquer every level! Sprint, leap, and pounce your way through challenges, but watch out—dangerous animals and deadly poison ivy stand in your way. Do you have the skills to help this curious kitty snag every feathered friend? How to play Kitty Loves Birds? Use WASD, the arrow keys or the arrow buttons to move. Who created Kitty Loves Birds? Kitty Loves Birds is created by Claudiu V. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Kitty Loves Birds for free? You can play Kitty Loves Birds for free on Poki. Can I play Kitty Loves Birds on mobile devices and desktop? Kitty Loves Birds can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
